personal.preferred_title: Data Engineer | AWS, PySpark, SQL & Cloud Data Platforms

summary: Data Engineer with deep experience building Python, SQL, and PySpark ETL pipelines across AWS-based data platforms. Strong background in AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, data warehousing, dimensional modeling, data quality, and analytics-ready reporting layers. Experienced translating business needs into reliable datasets, troubleshooting data workflows, and supporting cloud migration and modernization efforts in regulated enterprise environments.

experience.title: Senior Data Engineer / AWS Data Platform Engineer
bullets: Built Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, transforming raw operational data into analytics-ready datasets for reporting and capacity planning.
Developed AWS-based data platform components using S3 landing zones, Glue ETL, and Redshift to support scalable data processing and forecasting workloads.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and reporting data models for historical retention, trend analysis, and business-facing dashboards.
Migrated heavy forecasting and analytics workloads from on-prem Oracle environments to AWS/Redshift-backed processing patterns, improving scalability and parallel execution.
Containerized Python ETL jobs on EC2/ECS and used Git-based development practices to support repeatable data pipeline delivery.

experience.title: Performance Engineer / Data Analytics Engineer
bullets: Data-mined real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring data for critical hospitality systems, supporting operational analytics and reporting.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning by assessing monitoring readiness, data collection needs, and performance visibility gaps.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / APM Data & Reporting SME
bullets: Built Perl/Ksh data extraction scripts to automate weekly performance reporting and reduce manual data handling.
Designed dashboards, alerts, and SLA reporting views adopted as standards across enterprise client environments.
Collaborated with application, infrastructure, and performance teams to convert monitoring requirements into actionable reporting and analysis workflows.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Cloud & Data: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS, Data Warehousing, Data Modeling, Dimensional Modeling
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT Pipelines, PySpark, Apache Spark, Pandas, Data Quality, Reporting Pipelines, Pipeline Troubleshooting
skills.Warehousing & Analytics: Oracle, Redshift, Star Schema, Snowflake Concepts, BI-ready Datasets, Executive Dashboards
skills.Tools & Delivery: Airflow, Docker, Git, Streamlit, Linux/Unix, Agile/Scrum collaboration
skills.Learning / Exposure: Snowflake, dbt, Databricks, Terraform, Delta Lake, Apache Iceberg

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed AWS-based data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark for scalable ETL, analytics-ready datasets, and optimized Parquet/Snappy storage patterns.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built Python/PySpark data pipelines and forecasting datasets to predict infrastructure bottlenecks and surface insights through Streamlit dashboards.
